reason: Verify architecture, Chinese-first copy, and document-style commit compliance.
Verify start_rule command contract, sidecar limitation, and result/error shape.
Verify Rust-owned provider orchestration and structured diagnostics.
Verify OpenSSH launch uses structured Rule data and provider diagnostics.
Verify RuntimeSnapshot persistence and no credential storage regression.
Verify runtime/recovery state distinctions and temporary override boundaries.
Verify Swift only invokes bridge and renders returned snapshots.
Verify run/recovery actions remain explicit and native.
Verify provider abstraction and SSH/Tailscale scope.
Verify structured command/query behavior and no raw SSH command persistence.
Verify all acceptance criteria and out-of-scope boundaries.
